title: Neon Railway Saga
description: A reference-dependent fictional sci-fi poster campaign: one key art poster establishes title typography, hero, train, date, and studio mark, followed by three campaign variants.
creative_direction: This package tests whether a fictional IP can retain release-campaign identity across multiple poster formats. Image 01 establishes the title lockup and hero world; images 02-04 reuse the same fictional brand language, protagonist, vehicle, and copy hierarchy.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Neon Railway Saga
en.description: One fictional sci-fi key art poster expands into three campaign variants with consistent title, hero, and release copy.

zh-CN.title: 霓虹铁路传奇系列
zh-CN.description: 一张虚构科幻主视觉海报扩展成三张保持标题、主角和发布文案一致的系列海报。
